Notice Of Motion And Motion To Transfer Action [Ccp Sec 394]; Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Oct-20-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT COUNTY OF ALAMEDA Motion to Transfer Action [CCP Sec 394] From San Francisco, Superior Court, to the County of Alameda Superior Court, State of California. Appearances: Raymond L. MacKay, Esq. Deputy County Counsel, County of Alameda, (510) 272-6734 appearing for Defendant and moving party. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600
